title: pavanbadempet/AI-Healthcare-System
summary: Privacy-first AI Healthcare platform for HIPAA-compliant clinical workflows. Features a stateful LangGraph & MAF multi-agent RAG system, local Ollama LLMs, FastAPI, and React. Integrates PySpark Medallion Lakehouse analytics, HAPI FHIR patient imports, medical diagnostics ML models, and secure EHR hospital operations.

title: xuiltul/animaworks
summary: Organization-as-Code for autonomous AI agents. Brain-inspired memory that grows, consolidates, and forgets. Multi-model (Claude/Codex/Gemini/Cursor/Ollama).

title: AronMav/opex
summary: Self-hosted AI agent gateway built like infrastructure, not a chat app. A Rust core runs agents, tools, memory, cron, secrets. Agents live in Telegram / Discord / Slack / Matrix / WhatsApp; personas in Markdown, tools in YAML, hot-reloaded. Encrypted vault, DNS-level SSRF guard, sandboxed code exec.

title: Martossien/transcria
summary: Self-hosted meeting transcription portal — speech-to-text, speaker diarization, LLM-corrected transcripts, structured summaries and Word minutes, on your own GPUs. Flask + PostgreSQL, GDPR audit trail, distributed GPU topologies, docker

title: pdbethke/corralai
summary: One directive → a herd of AI agents that plan, build, verify, and re-plan across any model (local 7B to frontier) — human-gated, jail→repo, with shared memory + skills. Every mission recorded and replayable.

title: dovvnloading/Cortex
summary: Cortex is a fast, private desktop AI assistant for running local Large Language Models with Ollama. Everything stays on your device: no cloud, no external servers, and no third parties.

title: attenlabs/hotato
summary: Regression testing for voice agents. The transcript passed; the call failed. hotato scores the turn timing and checks what the agent said against what the backend did, then gates CI. Self-hosted, MIT.
